overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the foggy industrial district of Saint Denis. The character navigates narrow alleys between brick factories, passes workers carrying lumber, and emerges onto muddy city streets with tram tracks and horse-drawn carriages.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley between brick factory buildings

events.description: moves from open industrial yard into narrow brick alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through foggy industrial alley, passing wooden crates and electrical infrastructure

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow shirt walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: green industrial building with white lettering and large doors
tall factory smokestacks emitting smoke visible through fog
multi-story brick factory buildings with large windows
stacked wooden shipping crates and barriers
utility poles and electrical wires crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a foggy industrial district near the Lanik Electric Co building. The camera moves through narrow alleys lined with brick factory buildings and wooden crates, with smokestacks visible in the distance. A worker in a yellow shirt passes by in the opposite direction as the character enters a tighter brick corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: factory passage leading to Presnall & Francis Factory

events.description: approaches the large Presnall & Francis Factory building at end of alley
turns left at factory entrance into muddy yard area

agents.ego_description: proceeding down narrow passage toward factory entrance, then turning left into muddy yard

entered.detail: large industrial factory building with arched windows and prominent signage
painted sign on brick wall reading Lambert Machine Works
temporary wooden fencing and barriers near factory entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow brick corridor toward the imposing Presnall & Francis Factory. The Lambert Machine Works sign is visible on the left wall. Upon reaching the factory entrance, the character turns left into a muddy industrial yard with wooden barriers and fencing.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy industrial yard with wooden fencing and guard posts

events.description: enters narrow passage between high wooden fences
follows workers carrying lumber through narrow brick alley

agents.ego_description: navigating muddy terrain between fences, following workers carrying wooden planks

notable_agents.action: two workers carrying long wooden planks on their shoulders, walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: tall wooden privacy fences lining the muddy path
elevated water tower on metal supports visible through fog
small wooden guard house with window

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a muddy industrial yard flanked by wooden fences, passing a small guard shack. A water tower looms in the foggy distance. The character follows two workers carrying lumber through a narrow brick passage, transitioning from the open yard to a more enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy city street with tram tracks and horse traffic

events.description: exits narrow alley onto open muddy street with tram tracks
horse-drawn carriage passes from left to right on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along muddy city street, observing passing carriage and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two occupants moving across the street

entered.detail: wide unpaved road with muddy ruts and puddles
metal tram rails embedded in the muddy road surface
large building with white columns and classical architecture

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the character enters a wider muddy city street with visible tram tracks. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left. The environment opens up to show a large classical building with columns in the distance and a water tower visible through the fog. Various pedestrians walk along the muddy thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath elevated train tracks

events.description: passes under elevated wooden train tracks and walkways
turns slightly to approach building with arched entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along shaded street under elevated tracks, passing NPCs and horse riders

notable_agents.action: man on horseback riding along the street

entered.detail: wooden elevated railway structure with support beams casting shadows
building with prominent arched entrance and people gathered outside
cast iron street lamp post along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking beneath elevated wooden train tracks that cast striped shadows across the muddy path. The environment features brick walls on the left and wooden storefronts on the right. A man on horseback passes by, and the character approaches a building with distinctive arches where several people are gathered.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial district that gradually opens into a bustling, muddy city thoroughfare. It begins in a dense haze near the Lanik Electric Co building, navigating narrow alleys lined with brick factories and wooden crates before tightening into a corridor toward the Presnall & Francis Factory. As the character turns into a muddy industrial yard, the scene shifts past a guard shack and a distant water tower, following workers carrying lumber through another narrow brick passage. The environment then expands onto a wider city street with tram tracks and horse-drawn carriages, revealing a large classical building with columns through the lifting fog. Finally, the camera moves beneath elevated wooden train tracks that cast striped shadows across the path, passing a man on horseback toward a building with distinctive arches where a crowd has gathered.
